examples.translation_english: The hiking trail to the blue lagoon took five hours of continuous climbing.
examples.translation_native: The hiking trail to the blue lagoon took five hours of continuous climbing.

examples.sentence: Acordamos reunirnos en el punto de encuentro frente a la fuente si alguien se perdía.
examples.translation_english: We agreed to meet at the meeting point in front of the fountain if anyone got lost.
examples.translation_native: We agreed to meet at the meeting point in front of the fountain if anyone got lost.

examples.sentence: La demora en la frontera nos obligó a cancelar la reserva del primer hotel de la ruta.
examples.translation_english: The delay at the border forced us to cancel the reservation at the first hotel on the route.
examples.translation_native: The delay at the border forced us to cancel the reservation at the first hotel on the route.

examples.sentence: Buscamos un alojamiento alternativo en Airbnb después de que el hotel canceló la reserva sin previo aviso.
examples.translation_english: We looked for alternative accommodation on Airbnb after the hotel cancelled the reservation without notice.
examples.translation_native: We looked for alternative accommodation on Airbnb after the hotel cancelled the reservation without notice.
